title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
* Cash withdrawal limit of RS. 3 lakh and purchase limit at Point of Sale (POS) of RS. 5 lakh in a day.
  * 3 loyalty points for every RS. 100 spent at Merchant locations.
  * 4 Free visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport lounges in India.
  * Simply wave/tap the card on the contactless Point of Sale (PoS) and pay without entering PIN for purchases upto Rs. 5000.


IDBI Bank VISA Signature PayWave Debit Card offers 4 free visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport lounge in India. For List of participating Lounge please visit 
Cash withdrawal limit of RS. 3 lakh and purchase limit at Point of Sale (POS) of RS. 5 lakh in a day
You can use your IDBI Bank Signature Debit Card on the Internet for buying travel or movie tickets, paying your bills and much more. All you need to do is register yourself for “Verified by VISA". 
IDBI Bank Signature Debit Cardholder will get 3 loyalty points for every 100 spent at Merchant locations. 
_#Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant categories is subject to revision from time to time_
Air Accident Insurance Cover- 25 lakhs Personal Accident cover – 10 Lakh Loss of checked baggage – 2 lakhs for 90 days Purchase protection – Rs.2,00,000/- for 90 days. Fire and burglary for household contents – 2 lakhs
_*Effective 1st July 2013, for Insurance claims to be accepted and processed; there should be a minimum of 2 purchase transactions using the Debit Card in last 3 months prior to the event date._
The Signature Debit Card enables you to access the Global Customer assistance Service anytime from anywhere across the world. This service is offered by VISA and can be availed for following: 
The Card offers you the exclusive offers and discounts over a range of categories like: Dining, Travel, Lifestyle, Shopping and Health & Fitness. The Signature Debit Card also brings you a lot of supplementary benefits like: 

  
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As VISA Signature PayWave Debit Card are issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank Kids debit card is designed for the youngest segment of our customers; it is designed to instill some confidence in kids when it comes to handling money and savings
